method_summary: A three-tier architecture using complex wave patterns with amplitude-phase structure, featuring a Morphological Mapper that transforms inputs into semantic waveforms, a Field Memory Layer that stores knowledge as distributed holographic traces and retrieves via phase interference, and a Non-Contextual Generator that produces output guided by resonance rather than fixed context.
key_innovation: Eliminating sequential token dependence by encoding meaning as complex wave patterns with amplitude-phase structure and retrieving knowledge via phase interference in a holographic memory system.
title: Phase-Coded Memory and Morphological Resonance: A Next-Generation Retrieval-Augmented Generator Architecture
